apiKeys.subtitulo: Manage access keys for Power BI and other integrations
apiKeys.acessoRestritoDesc: Only administrators can manage API Keys.
apiKeys.seguranca1: API keys are stored with SHA-256 hash — the original value is shown only once.
apiKeys.seguranca2: Each key only accesses data from its associated company (multi-tenant isolation).
apiKeys.seguranca3: Define scopes to limit which entities the key can access.
apiKeys.seguranca4: Use allowed IPs to restrict access to known servers.
apiKeys.powerBiTitle: How to connect in Power BI
apiKeys.nenhumaKeyDesc: Create one to integrate with Power BI or other systems.
apiKeys.copieAgoraDesc: This is the only time the key will be shown. It cannot be recovered afterwards.
apiKeys.scopesDesc: Leave empty to allow all entities.
apiKeys.separeIPs: Separate multiple IPs with a comma.
apiKeys.confirmarRevogar: Are you sure you want to revoke the API key "{name}"?
apiKeys.revogarDesc: All integrations using this key will stop working immediately.
